name: Hyperparameter Sweep
description: Plan and verify a controlled hyperparameter sweep with fixed objectives, search space, metrics, approvals, and evidence outputs.

inputs.description: Training or evaluation goal the sweep should optimize.
Primary metric used to rank sweep trials.
Parameters, ranges, distributions, and fixed controls for the sweep.
Baseline training or evaluation configuration to vary from.

permissions.description: Read model, dataset, configuration, metric, and prior experiment metadata needed to plan the sweep.

approval_points.description: Confirm objective, metric, fixed controls, search space, and stop criteria.
Confirm the bounded trial matrix, resource assumptions, and evidence capture plan before any run starts.
Publish sweep conclusions, selected configuration, or model-card evidence outside the local workspace.

phases.name: Sweep Objective
phases.objective: Define the optimization target, baseline, fixed controls, ranking metric, and non-goals.

phases.name: Search Space
phases.objective: Document parameters, ranges, distributions, seeds, resource envelope, and pruning or stop rules.

phases.name: Dry Run
phases.objective: Validate one tiny configuration through preprocessing, training or evaluation wiring, logging, and metric extraction.

phases.name: Run Plan
phases.objective: Freeze the bounded trial matrix, environment, seeds, artifact names, and result table schema.

phases.name: Results Analysis
phases.objective: Compare trial metrics, baseline deltas, stability, failed trials, and selected configuration evidence.

phases.name: Report
phases.objective: Summarize conclusions, caveats, reproducibility evidence, and optional publication notes.

required_outputs.description: Objective, primary metric, baseline, fixed controls, and non-goals.
Parameters, ranges, distributions, constraints, seeds, and stop rules.
Base configuration, fixed controls, metric extraction, and logging schema.
Tiny-run command, output, metric extraction result, and exit status.
Trial matrix, resource assumptions, artifact layout, and run identifiers.
Runtime, dependency versions, hardware class, and seed controls.
Trial metrics, baseline deltas, selected configuration, and failure notes.
Best observed configuration with metric value, run id, and selection rationale.
Sweep conclusions, reliability caveats, and recommended next step.

artifacts.description: Machine-readable search space and trial matrix.
Trial-level metrics, configs, statuses, and baseline deltas.
Selected configuration and supporting metric evidence.

verifiers.description: Sweep objective maps to an observable metric, baseline, and bounded comparison.
Base configuration, fixed controls, seeds, trainer settings, and metric extraction are captured.
Primary metric, aggregation, tie-breakers, and reporting format are documented.
Dry run validates preprocessing, execution wiring, logging, and metric extraction.
Environment, dependency versions, hardware class, and seed controls are recorded.
Sweep results include metric values, split or dataset, trial id, and ranking field.
Best trial is compared against baseline or default configuration metrics.
Failed trials, metric variance, stability, and selection caveats were reviewed.
Final conclusions cite run plan, metrics table, best configuration, and reliability notes.
